questions.question: Differentiate between strong and weak entities with examples
keyPoints: Weak: Depends on strong entity (e.g., Dependent)
Weak has partial key and total participation

questions.question: Explain composite vs multivalued attributes with diagram notation
keyPoints: Composite: Tree structure with sub-attributes (ellipses connected)

keyPoints: Cardinalities: Member can borrow multiple books
